title: Security
description: User data, including text prompts and videos, should be encrypted both in transit and at rest, and access to sensitive services should be restricted based on user roles and permissions

title: Usability
description: The System user interface UI must be intuitive to be adequate for users of different technical backgrounds and proficiency

title: Performance
description: The system should generate a 5-Response time for user interactions with the UI should be less than 1 second

title: Reliability
description: The system should be available 24/7, except during scheduled maintenance windows

title: Scalability
description: The system should have a 99.9% uptime and support 100 concurrent users without significant performance degradation

title: Maintainability
description: The system should facilitate user access, facilitate easy updates and maintenance, ensure well-documented code, and establish a knowledge transfer plan for developers and support staff

title: Adaptability
description: The system should have the capability to evolve and accommodate changes in technology, user requirements, or business needs without major disruptions

title: Compliance
description: Licensing and usage of external APIs should adhere to legal and ethical standards

title: Data Protection
description: The system should comply with relevant data protection regulations

title: Accessibility
description: The system should comply with accessibility standards to ensure usability for users with disabilities
